memberdef.argsstring: (ServerSettingsPtr InServerSettings, FAccelByteTimeManagerPtr InTimeManager, TSharedRef< FAccelByteInstance, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > InAccelByteInstance)
memberdef.name: FServerApiClient

briefdescription.para: Utility function to get the device ID associated with this ServerApiClient's AccelByteInstance.

simplesect.para: device ID string, may be empty if AccelByteInstance is invalid or Device ID not found
